form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr3) over 1700m at this track, beaten 3.5 m by Princess Gracy (1:58.30) in 4yo+ M on April 2 at $5.60. Before that, a good run when 3rd (Fr5) over 2200m at Alexandra Park beaten 5.5 m by Princess Gracy (2:39.10) in 4yo+ M on March 20 at $7.40. Look for improvement on last start. Fitter now and well served by the ace draw.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Posted a big 3.5 m win (Fr6) at Manawatu (2:26.20) beating Gotta Elect Bill in on March 31 at $6.10. Two runs back 4th (Fr6) over 2000m at Manawatu beaten 8 m by Fredastaire (2:25.40) in 3yo+ on March 29 at $9.20. Has the job ahead.

form.formComment: Four-year-old mare is racing in fine form. Won her last two outings at this track and Alexandra Park. Last start won by a neck (Fr5) at this track (1:58.30) beating Soul Artist in 4yo+ M on April 2 at $5.20. Leading contender again.
